description: President Ellis names a new head for the ATCU and has a final conversation with Coulson, confirming that the new head will take orders from him. Their exchange is professional, signaling a new chapter in S.H.I.E.L.D.'s operation and the government's ongoing partnership with Coulson despite mutual distrust and lingering tensions.

transcript.line: It makes perfect sense to name him the head of the ATCU. He knows all the players, the public respects military authority. You've worked together.
He has the utmost respect for you.
Remember, he'll be taking orders from you.
And I'm sure he's thrilled about that.
I'm confident this will work out, Coulson.
